posting_authority.title: Enable Faster Posting
posting_authority.description: Grant Ecency posting permission to post without opening Keychain each time
posting_authority.benefit_1: Post, comment, and vote instantly without Keychain prompts
posting_authority.benefit_2: Seamless experience across all posting operations
posting_authority.benefit_3: Secure - only allows posting actions, not transfers
posting_authority.security_note: Safe: Cannot transfer funds or change keys. You can revoke this anytime.
